targets.rawSql: SELECT symbol, avg(latency_ms) AS avg_ms FROM latency_log WHERE binance_ts > dateadd('d', -1, now()) GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY avg_ms DESC
SELECT timestamp AS time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2 AS binance_btc FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='BTCUSDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ALIGN TO CALENDAR
SELECT timestamp AS time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2 AS flipster_btc FROM flipster_bookticker WHERE symbol='BTCUSDT.PERP' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ALIGN TO CALENDAR

SELECT symbol, last(bid_price) bid, last(ask_price) ask, (last(ask_price)-last(bid_price))/last(bid_price)*10000 spread_bp FROM flipster_bookticker WHERE timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now()) GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY spread_bp ASC
SELECT timestamp AS time, exchange, symbol, rate FROM funding_rate WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SELECT binance_ts AS time, symbol, latency_ms FROM latency_log WHERE $__timeFilter(binance_ts)
SELECT timestamp AS time, sum(pnl_bp) OVER (ORDER BY timestamp) AS cum_bp FROM position_log WHERE mode='paper' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT account_id, strategy, count() n, sum(pnl_bp) total_bp, avg(pnl_bp) avg_bp FROM position_log WHERE timestamp > dateadd('d', -1, now()) GROUP BY account_id, strategy ORDER BY total_bp DESC
